creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since this is a tool for auditing ssh servers it's important that the program knows about current situation security threats. The original author hasn't committed any changes to his code since Nov 2, 2016 (this is > 3 years). The forked version is well maintained and it's most recent version has been release 8 days ago.

See the following impressive release summary:

https://github.com/jtesta/ssh-audit/releases
